text: Artificial intelligence is transforming many parts of our lives, from job applications to medical diagnoses. However, it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias: if AI systems are trained on data that reflects past discrimination, they may make unfair decisions. Fairness requires that AI treats all people equally, regardless of their background. Privacy is another key issue, as AI often collects huge amounts of personal data. Transparency means that people should understand how and why an AI system reaches its conclusions. Finally, responsible AI development involves creating systems that are safe, accountable, and aligned with human values. By addressing these issues, we can build AI that benefits everyone.
